- Shameen ran `openclaw update` this morning to restart gateway (it had gone offline overnight) - Root cause: `networkoversleep = 0` — network dropped when Mac slept - **Fix applied:** `sudo pmset -a networkoversleep 1` and `sudo pmset -a disksleep 0`
